content: Now let's create the completely redesigned chat UI for **admin** (`app.js`). I'll rebuild the entire chat section with a pro messenger design:

args.Description: "Complete pro chat redesign: wider modal (680px), compact immersive bubble layout with inline sender+time, gradient \"me\" bubbles, image thumbnails with lightbox viewer, image attachment button with hidden file input, and smooth animations. The chat area is taller (360px) and bubbles are visually compact with no wasted height."
args.Instruction: "Replace the entire viewTicketDetails function, fetchAndRenderChatMessages, and sendTicketMessage in app.js with the redesigned pro chat UI that supports images"
args.TargetFile: "c:\\Users\\Allenmar\\Documents\\Proyectos de AS Sierra Systems\\Administracion AS Sierra Systems\\frontend\\js\\app.js"
args.toolAction: "Replacing chat UI with pro design in app.js"
